principle: Profile visuals must express autonomous mini OS identities. Equinox is the balanced general experience; specialized profiles change purpose, tools, Waybar signals and UI mood without polluting one another.

equinox.label: Equinox Balance
equinox.waybar: balanced public shell: profile, Spotlight, media, network, battery and SevenAI
equinox.ui_mood: neutral glass, calm productivity, all-purpose readiness
equinox.design_signal: no domain dominates; every control feels general and approachable

baobab.label: Baobab Culture
baobab.waybar: culture and learning shell: identity, reader/media, language, connectivity, battery and light AI
baobab.ui_mood: warm cultural calm, community memory, African learning surfaces

forge.label: Forge Developer
forge.waybar: developer shell: profile, Spotlight, project flow, network, recorder and code-aware AI
forge.ui_mood: focused engineering cockpit, terminal clarity, git/build/container readiness
forge.design_signal: code, services and local builds are first-class

shield.label: Shield Cybersecurity
shield.waybar: security shell: profile, network, Bluetooth, VPN, recorder and audit-aware AI
shield.ui_mood: trust dashboard, scoped actions, isolation and evidence-safe surfaces
shield.design_signal: authorized scope and safety are always visible

studio.label: Studio Creator
studio.waybar: creator shell: profile, media, audio, recorder, battery and production AI
studio.ui_mood: creative canvas, asset-first layout, color/media/export emphasis
studio.design_signal: design, video, audio and capture tools come forward

windows.label: Windows Bridge
windows.waybar: Windows bridge shell: VM readiness, app routing, network, audio, battery and assistant
windows.ui_mood: complete Windows VM path, compatibility guidance, app-first bridge
windows.design_signal: VM-first Windows experience, with Wine/Bottles as lighter fallbacks

horizon.label: Horizon Cloud
horizon.waybar: cloud shell: profile, Spotlight, network, VPN, recorder and service-aware AI
horizon.ui_mood: deployment navigator, services dashboard, endpoints and logs
horizon.design_signal: server, deploy and network controls are primary

pulse.label: Pulse Gaming
pulse.waybar: gaming shell: profile, media, audio, battery, recorder and low-latency AI
pulse.design_signal: games, frame pacing and performance become the center
